comment: Mock of SAP BTP GET /api/v1/IntegrationRuntimeArtifacts. Integrations list should only contain deployed/runtime artifacts.

value.name: SF EC → Vendor Employee File
value.description: Daily delta extract of Employee Central worker master data delivered to the vendor SFTP as a pipe-delimited file.

value.name: SF EC → Payroll Full Extract
value.description: Full-mode payroll extract with compensation and recurring pay components.

value.name: SF EC ← Cost Center Replication
value.description: Inbound cost center replication from S/4HANA into Employee Central foundation objects.

value.name: Recruiting → Onboarding Handover
value.description: Moves new hire data from Recruiting to Onboarding 2.0 on offer acceptance.

value.name: EC Org Structure → Identity Provider
value.description: Synchronises organisational assignments to the corporate IdP for role provisioning.

value.name: Compensation → Benefits Vendor
value.description: Annual and ad-hoc compensation feed to the external benefits administration platform.
